text: 454 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «مَنْ أَخَذَ بِجَوَانِبِ اَلسَّرِيرِ اَلْأَرْبَعَةِ غَفَرَ اَللَّهُ لَهُ أَرْبَعِينَ كَبِيرَةً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.454 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever takes hold of the four sides of the bier (funeral bier) will have forty major sins forgiven by Allah (swt)."
